metadata.notes: Visa summaries are structured from official immigration guidance for planning only. Users must verify requirements, documents, and processing with Hi Korea or the relevant Korean diplomatic mission before applying.

description: Residence status category that may include points-based or family/residence pathways depending on eligibility.
eligibility: Meet the relevant F-2 subcategory requirements
Income, education, language, residence, or family criteria where applicable
processing_time: Varies by immigration office and subcategory; confirm officially.
renewal: Renewal depends on maintaining the relevant residence eligibility conditions.
notes: Not a single universal route; applicants should identify the exact F-2 subcategory before planning.
